title: Artemisia nutantiflora
taxonomy: Artemisia nutantiflora belongs to the family Asteraceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This species is a type of shrub or herb that is native to certain regions. As a member of the genus Artemisia, it is closely related to other plants commonly known as wormwood or sagebrush. The classification of Artemisia nutantiflora also includes its order (Asterales) and class (Magnoliopsida). Further classification would include its kingdom (Plantae) and division (Magnoliophyta).
